rule.name: Boost Unsafe Memory/String API
rule.rule_desc: Detects unsafe memory/string APIs in C++ code.
rule.vuln_desc: Improper memory operations can cause overflow and memory safety issues.
rule.developer: Use safer abstractions and explicit bounds checks.
rule.reviewer: Inspect unsafe calls for size validation and tainted input.

rule.name: Boost Command Execution Sink
rule.rule_desc: Detects OS command execution APIs in C++ code paths.
rule.vuln_desc: User-influenced command strings can lead to command injection.
rule.developer: Avoid shell execution or strictly validate/allow-list inputs.
rule.reviewer: Trace untrusted data flow into command execution.

rule.name: Boost TLS Validation Bypass Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects TLS validation bypass markers in C++/Qt networking code.
rule.vuln_desc: TLS bypass permits interception and spoofing attacks.
rule.developer: Enforce strict certificate validation and remove bypasses.
rule.reviewer: Audit all network client TLS settings.

rule.name: Boost Hardcoded Secret Material
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely hardcoded secrets in C++ source.
rule.vuln_desc: Hardcoded credentials may leak through source/binary exposure.
rule.reviewer: Confirm no production credentials are embedded.

rule.name: Boost Insecure Serialization/Deserialization Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects serialization/deserialization APIs that need trust-boundary review.
rule.vuln_desc: Deserializing untrusted data can lead to memory and logic vulnerabilities.
rule.developer: Validate input formats and enforce strict schema checks.
rule.reviewer: Review deserialization boundaries and source trust assumptions.
